feedback.text: Good day, I would like to bring to attention the unfair conduct of video game companies and publishers that, over the course of the past years, have nonchalantly destroyed digital games on the basis that people did not own it. This gray area between ownership and renting of digital video games allowed corporations to essentially sell something and take it away when it was convenient. The citizen's initiative "Stop Destroying Videogames" already has over one million signatures and I wish as consumers we got the same treatment as any other person purchasing a product online did. Please research the situation as there have already been attacks from companies that tried to shut down the initiative.
